title: Fail on a simple combinatol logic

features.name: unpacked array port in module
features.description: Code should include a module with unpacked array ports using the [7:0] name [3:0] syntax

features.name: combinational always block with for loop over unpacked array
features.description: Code should include an always @* block containing a for loop that iterates over array indices using an integer loop variable
features.snippet:
always @* begin
    for (integer i = 0; i < 4; i = i + 1) begin
        vector2[i] = vector1[i];
    end
end

features.name: unpacked array assignment via indexed for loop in always @*
features.description: Code should include an unpacked array assigned inside a for loop within a combinational always block, where array elements are copied via index
